title: Department of Radio, Television and Cinema - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Radio, Television and Cinema - Student Opinions

"While I was studying at Istanbul Esenyurt University, the experiences I had greatly improved me. I feel very lucky to have had the opportunity to do my internship on the film plateau where experts work in the campus of my school, at the radio, television and cinema department. When I have problems with my courses, I can easily reach my professors and academic staff. They have always been very helpful to me. I'm really glad to study at this university because my university gave me the oppurtinity to get involved in professional life while I was a student. Also I had a good time in various modern social areas such as the library at the university without getting bored. I will never forget the good memories that Istanbul Esenyurt University gave me."

"I want to start by saying that I made the right decision by coming to Istanbul Esenyurt University. I have gotten many good experiences at the university. Having the opportunity to do an internship at the school's Plateau, I had the chance to gain experience in the radio, television and cinema department. I am lucky to study at a university that listens to students problems in every sense and finds solutions to their problems. While graduating from this school, I have collected good memories and I am glad that I came to this school."

This content was updated on 15/09/2024.
